examples: In 1854, lots of British soldiers went to fight in the Crimean War.
They originally existed in only a small region of the Crimean Peninsula.
Passing the halls by one by one you like 'live' through the events of that time from the Crimean War till the WWII.
The Battle of Alma was considered the first major battle of the Crimean War.
So is there now some arbitrary cut-off point, the Crimean War (1853-6) perhaps?
